name: community-app-backend
description: Microservices starter template with Express, TypeScript, and MySQL/Prisma.

scripts.dev: npm run env:setup && npm run contracts:build && node ./scripts/dev-services.mjs
scripts.dev:restart: npm run env:setup && npm run contracts:build && node ./scripts/dev-services.mjs --restart
scripts.dev:restart:auth: npm run env:setup && npm run contracts:build && node ./scripts/dev-services.mjs --restart=auth-service
scripts.dev:gateway: npm run env:setup && npm run contracts:build && npm run dev -w services/api-gateway
scripts.dev:auth: npm run env:setup && npm run contracts:build && npm run dev -w services/auth-service
scripts.dev:store: npm run env:setup && npm run contracts:build && npm run dev -w services/store-service
scripts.dev:newsfeed: npm run env:setup && npm run contracts:build && npm run dev -w services/newsfeed-service
scripts.dev:app: npm run env:setup && npm run contracts:build && npm run dev -w services/app-service
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w services/api-gateway && npm run build -w services/auth-service && npm run build -w services/store-service && npm run build -w services/newsfeed-service && npm run build -w services/app-service
scripts.test: npm run test -w services/api-gateway && npm run test -w services/auth-service && npm run test -w services/store-service && npm run test -w services/newsfeed-service && npm run test -w services/app-service
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w services/api-gateway && npm run lint -w services/auth-service && npm run lint -w services/store-service && npm run lint -w services/newsfeed-service && npm run lint -w services/app-service && npm run lint -w packages/contracts
scripts.format: npm run format -w services/api-gateway && npm run format -w services/auth-service && npm run format -w services/store-service && npm run format -w services/newsfeed-service && npm run format -w services/app-service && npm run format -w packages/contracts
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w services/api-gateway && npm run typecheck -w services/auth-service && npm run typecheck -w services/store-service && npm run typecheck -w services/newsfeed-service && npm run typecheck -w services/app-service && npm run typecheck -w packages/contracts
scripts.prisma:generate: npm run env:setup && npm run prisma:generate:auth && npm run prisma:generate:store && npm run prisma:generate:newsfeed && npm run prisma:generate:app
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm run env:setup && npm run prisma:migrate:auth && npm run prisma:migrate:store && npm run prisma:migrate:newsfeed && npm run prisma:migrate:app
scripts.prisma:deploy: npm run env:setup && npm run prisma:deploy:auth && npm run prisma:deploy:store && npm run prisma:deploy:newsfeed && npm run prisma:deploy:app
scripts.prisma:seed: npm run env:setup && npm run prisma:seed:auth && npm run prisma:seed:store && npm run prisma:seed:newsfeed && npm run prisma:seed:app
